notes: 10k linear pot wired as a 2-terminal rheostat (wiper strapped to one end); dial at 0.0 = min resistance (brightest), 1.0 = max resistance (dimmest)
description: A variable resistor: twist the dial and the resistance — and so the current it lets through — changes live. Wired here as a simple two-leg rheostat, the same role a fixed resistor plays, except the value moves.
